parsed.production_notes: Features real human actors in a physical set with natural lighting, shadows, and realistic movements. No AI artifacts present.

characters.appearance: Young adult Indian woman, medium build, medium complexion. Dark hair tied back in a ponytail. Has a bindi.
characters.wardrobe: Green and blue patterned salwar kameez with a matching green dupatta. Red and gold bangles on both wrists.

characters.appearance: Young adult Indian man, medium build, medium complexion. Short dark hair and a short beard.
characters.wardrobe: Black polo shirt and black trousers. Gold watch on his left wrist.

scenes.setting: Office or waiting area. White walls, grid of small framed paintings, small artificial Christmas tree.

panels.panel_visual_description: A woman sits in a black chair in a brightly lit room with white walls. Behind her is a grid of small, framed landscape paintings and a small, decorated artificial Christmas tree. She holds a black smartphone to her ear, then lowers it. A man stands to her right, looking down at her. He gestures with his hands as he speaks. The woman looks up at him, gesturing with her left hand while holding the phone in her right.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is seated, finishing a phone call in English. Character B approaches, surprised by her fluency. They have a conversation where she explains she uses an app to learn. The camera remains static on the two characters.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Hello sir. My husband is not available right now. Can I take a message? I will ask him to call you back.
Character B says: अरे किट्टू, तुमने इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश बोलना कहाँ से सीखी? [Hey Kittu, where did you learn to speak such good English?]
Character A says: हाँ, जब आप ऑफिस में होते हो, तब मैं इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप पर 10 मिनट प्रैक्टिस करती हूँ रोज़। [Yes, when you are at the office, I practice for 10 minutes daily on the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: और मुझे बहुत ही आसानी से मेरी लैंग्वेज में सब सिखा देते हैं। [And they teach me everything very easily in my language.]
Character B says: लेकिन उसे यूज़ करने में खर्चा कितना हुआ? [But how much did it cost to use it?]
Character A says: एक कप चाय से भी कम। [Less than a cup of tea.]
Character B says: क्या बात कर रही हो? फिर तो मैं भी आज से इसे ट्राई करूँगा। [What are you saying? Then I will also try it from today.]

scenes.setting: Same office room, slightly different angle showing an AC unit.

panels.panel_visual_description: The woman stands in the same room, now facing the camera directly. She holds her smartphone in her left hand and gestures with her right hand as she speaks. The camera angle has shifted slightly, showing more of the white wall, an air conditioning unit near the ceiling, and a different arrangement of framed paintings. The man is visible in the background on the right, looking down at his own smartphone.

scenes.visual_description: Character A stands up and addresses the viewer directly, pitching the benefits of the app. Character B remains in the background, looking at his phone. The camera tracks Character A slightly as she moves.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: क्या आप भी मेरे जैसा सबको इम्प्रेस करना चाहते हो? [Do you also want to impress everyone like me?]
Character A says: तो आज ही इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Then download the English Seekho app today.]
Character A says: अगर आपको भी अपनी इंग्लिश इम्प्रूव करनी है, तो अभी डाउनलोड करो इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप। [If you also want to improve your English, then download the English Seekho app now.]
Character A says: यहाँ आपको मिलता है इंग्लिश सीखो कोच, जो 24 आवर्स आपके लिए अवेलेबल है। [Here you get an English Seekho coach, who is available for you 24 hours.]
Character A says: आप चाहे जितनी गलतियां करो, वो आपको कभी जज नहीं करेगा। [No matter how many mistakes you make, they will never judge you.]
Character A says: इनस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप अभी डाउनलोड करो। [Click on the install button and download the English Seekho app now.]

panels.panel_visual_description: A black smartphone is displayed vertically against a plain white background.

scenes.visual_description: A graphic end card showing a smartphone displaying the app's logo and name, with a green install button below it.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: तो इनस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A black screen with a long paragraph of white disclaimer text typing out.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
